2026-04-09.content:
You can now use
Gemini Code Assist to get AI-powered assistance in Firestore
to [generate MQL queries using natural language prompts](https://docs.cloud.google.com/firestore/mongodb-compatibility/docs/write-mql-gemini).
This feature is available in [Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products#product-launch-stages).

summary.title: AI-powered assistance for Firestore queries
summary.summary: Gemini Code Assist now offers AI-powered assistance for Firestore, allowing you to generate MQL queries using natural language prompts. This new feature, available in Preview, simplifies data querying in Firestore.

2026-03-16.content: Support for [managing TTL indexes](https://cloud.google.com/firestore/mongodb-compatibility/docs/ttl#create_ttl_index) in the MongoDB API.

summary.title: TTL indexes support
summary.summary: You can now manage TTL indexes in the MongoDB API. This feature allows you to automatically remove documents from collections after a specified time. Learn more about how to create TTL indexes.

2026-02-02.content:
The Firestore databases page in the Google Cloud console now includes
a status column. Possible statuses include:

* Ready
* Cloning is in progress
* Restoring from backup is in progress
* Deleted
* Failed

For the cloning and restore statuses, the status column updates upon completion.

summary.title: New status column in Firestore
summary.summary: The Firestore databases page now displays a status column, showing states like Ready, Cloning in progress, Restoring from backup, Deleted, or Failed. This column updates in real-time for cloning and restore operations.

2025-11-21.content: Support for Object as document `_id` identifier.

summary.title: Object ID Support
summary.summary: You can now use objects as document identifiers. This feature enhances flexibility for unique document identification.
